content: We can adapt React's component-based UI architecture to design modular curiosity modules for reinforcement learning agents, where interchangeable ICM and RND curiosity components can be plugged into different agent backbones just like custom Thumbnail or LikeButton components are reused across React UIs. This modular framework would let researchers rapidly test how different curiosity mechanisms interact with different reward structures and environment types.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
